title: Everbuild 503 Premium S.B.R. Bond Admixture – Water Resistant Bonding Agent – White – 2.5 Litre & Opti-Mix Super Concentrated Mortar Plasticiser – High-Strength – Easy to Use – 1 Litre, Dark Brown
features: Product 1: SUPERIOR ADHESION – A premium latex-based water-resistant bonding agent and admixture. Improved adhesion to a wide range of substrates including concrete, steel, and tiles. Ideal for external use.
Product 1: WATER RESISTANT – Excellent for use in areas subject to humidity, dampness, and water contact. Ideal for external renderings, mortars, and screeds
Product 1: DURABLE – This bonding agent forms a reinforcing polymer that increases long-term durability and flexibility.
Product 1: VERSATILE – Adheres to a wide variety of different substrates, including dense concrete, steel, and tiles.
Product 2: CONCENTRATED – This mortar admix is a highly concentrated air-entraining liquid plasticising admixture.
Product 2: HIGH-STRENGTH – The highly concentrated formula is 25 times the strength of conventional admixes.
Product 2: DURABLE – Forms extremely stable air bubbles and helps to prevent shrinkage, cracking, crazing and mild frost damage.
Product 2: SUPERIOR WORKABILITY – Gives mortar a buttery consistency, which helps to improve the workability of mortar.
description: Everbuild 503 Premium S.B.R. Bond Admixture – Water Resistant Bonding Agent – White – 2.5 litre Everbuild 503 Premium S.B.R. Bond Admixture is a styrene-butadiene, synthetic rubber (latex-based) water resistant bonding agent and admixture for use in areas subject to humidity, dampness and water contact including vapour. Add to mortar, screeds, and renders to greatly improve adhesion to a wide range of substrates including dense concrete, steel, tiles and more. S.B.R. improves water resistance of cement mixtures by forming a reinforcing polymer that increases long-term durability and flexibility of the mix on renderings and floor screeds. 503 Premium S.B.R. Bond Admixture contains anti-foam to control the density of cementitious mixes. Use 503 Premium S.B.R. Bond Admixture to greatly improve resistance to many chemicals as well as improve frost resistance due to a reduced water: cement ratio, giving the added benefit of improving workability. 503 Premium S.B.R. Bond Admixture can also be used as a primer or sealer in tiling applications. Finally, in comparison to PVA, 503 SBR Bond is not adversely affected in wet conditions and therefore is recommended for exterior use. Everbuild Opti-Mix Super Concentrated Mortar Plasticiser – High-Strength – Easy to Use – 1 Litre, Dark Brown Everbuild Opti-Mix Super Concentrated Mortar Plasticiser offers 25 times the concentration of traditional admixtures. Lends a buttery consistency to mortar that gives great trowelability and help prevent shrinkage, cracking and crazing. This plasticiser forms very stable air bubbles, helping to reduce the risk of frost damage and providing long-term resistance to freeze/thaw cycles. Comes in a gauged bottle to allow for dosage control, consistent mix, reduced waste and replaces lime in the mix to reduce the chance of efflorescence.
